Causes: 1) Rect-to-Region Mapping May Not Be Unique; If the same rect is added as both a weather rect and a snow rect (or appears in multiple zones), it may be registered twice in RegionRect, resulting in multiple region indices for the same rect.

Causes: 2)  Prevent Duplicate Region Registration; In RegisterRegionRectInternal, you already check if a rect is registered (FindRegionIndex(r) != -1). But if the same rect is used for both weather and snow
Causes: 3) StopZoneWeatherInternal and SetZoneWeatherInternal use FindRegionIndex(r) to get a single region index. If a rect is registered more than once, only the first is stopped/started.
Causes: 4) Ensure each rect is only registered once in RegionRect.

Ability 1 type: Type: Melee strike / curse-style debuff

Ability 2 type: Directional cone, ground-locked
Ability 2 description: Chimairo rears back and exhales a green corrosive cloud.

Ability 3: Acidic Rupture (Venom Spread / Anti-Clump)
Ability 3 type: Venom synergy tool
Ability 3 description:  Any unit affected by Corrosive Venom explodes if not dispelled or keep above 75 % hp
Ability 3 effect: Small AoE around the target, Applies Corrosive Venom (short duration) to nearby units
Ability 3 design notes: Punishes stacked melee, Encourages spacing even in small arenas, encourages healing and dispelling
Ability 4: Sky Rend Charge (Fly-Charge)
Ability 4 type: Leap / flying charge
Ability 4 description: Chimairo launches into the air, then crashes through enemies.
Ability 4 effect: Chimairo becomes briefly flying and untargetable, Charges to a target location or unit, Deals heavy damage in a line on impact, Knocks units aside and applies Corrosive Venom
Ability 4 design notes: Excellent reposition tool, Breaks ranged safety, player has to be aware of not falling over cliff from knock-back
Ability 5: Rending Talons (Cleave Strike)
Ability 5 type: Cleaving melee strike
Ability 5 description: Cleaving melee attacks
Ability 5 effect: Cleaves in a wide arc
Ability 5 design notes: Reinforces frontal danger, Makes positioning matter
Ability 6: Predator’s Frenzy (Enrage / Phase Ability)
Ability 6 type: Enrage
Ability 6 description: Enrage phase below 35–40% HP
Ability 6 effect: Increased attack speed and movement speed, more Venomous Breath and Sky Rend Charge usage
Ability 6 design notes: Creates a dramatic final phase, Encourages defensive cooldown usage
